title: Tom Thumb and Little Red Riding Hood
writer: Fernando Morales Ortiz, Adolfo Torres Portillo, Sergio Magaña Hidalgo
actors: María Gracia, Cesáreo Quezadas 'Pulgarcito', José Elías Moreno
plot: Follow up to Caperucita y sus tres amigos. Caperucita, the Wolf and the Ogre are captured by the Witch Queen, accused of treason by the Vampire. Caperucita, followed by a host of old and new characters begin the adventure to rescu...
